creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
The latest version of dualverver's port was badly patched and as a result the port doesn't work properly in FreeBSD. Because porting the patch is a little bit complex due to the monolithic (un)design of the code, I plan to  revert the last upgrades and go back to the 6.94 version who works perfectly.

This changes doesn't reintroduce security issues or known bugs.
